name: ai-usage-widget
description: Pixel-style floating widget for monitoring Claude and Codex usage on Windows desktop.

scripts.dist: electron-packager . "AI Usage Widget" --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=release --overwrite && powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (Test-Path 'release/AI Usage Widget-win32-x64.zip') { Remove-Item 'release/AI Usage Widget-win32-x64.zip' -Force }; Compress-Archive -Path 'release/AI Usage Widget-win32-x64/*' -DestinationPath 'release/AI Usage Widget-win32-x64.zip'"
